title: Is it possible to access the member of a user-defined struct in SystemVerilog using VPI and verilator?

features.name: packed struct exposed to VPI with public_flat_rd
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with multiple logic fields exposed to verilator via the public_flat_rd attribute on an input port
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] field1; logic [7:0] field2; } my_struct_t;
input my_struct_t port /*verilator public_flat_rd*/;

features.name: VPI struct member access via dot notation returns nil
features.description: Code should include attempting to access a struct member via VPI using vpi_handle_by_name with dot notation on a packed struct member path
